title: klasea rugulosa
intro: Klasea rugulosa, also known as the hairy-fruited klasea, is a perennial plant species in the borage family native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Klasea rugulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Klasea rugulosa is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing its bioactive compounds to be extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
